name: libxml-sax-perl
title: libxml-sax-perl
summary: Perl module for using and building Perl SAX2 XML processors
description:
Perl module for using and building Perl SAX2 XML processors
XML::SAX consists of several framework classes for using and
building Perl SAX2 XML parsers, filters, and drivers.  It is designed
around the need to be able to "plug in" different SAX parsers to an
application without requiring programmer intervention.  Those of you
familiar with the DBI will be right at home.  Some of the designs
come from the Java JAXP specification (SAX part), only without the
javaness.
.
The package also contains a SAX parser, XML::SAX::PurePerl, but it
is considered too slow for serious use and is only provided as a
fallback parser. It is recommend XML::SAX::Expat (provided in
libxml-sax-expat-perl) instead.
.
The framework includes a Debian-specific script (called
update-perl-sax-parsers) to manage the ParserDetails.ini file. This
script is intended to be used in postinst and prerm package scripts to
(de)register parsers.  See README.Debian for more info.

arguments.description: Adds the per-module info file for the indicated Perl SAX parser module to the directory

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use update-perl-sax-parsers because Perl module for using and building Perl SAX2 XML processors.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use update-perl-sax-parsers as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `update-perl-sax-parsers [options] --add parser_module` as documented upstream for update-perl-sax-parsers.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `update-perl-sax-parsers [options] --remove parser_module` as documented upstream for update-perl-sax-parsers.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `update-perl-sax-parsers [options] --update` as documented upstream for update-perl-sax-parsers.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair update-perl-sax-parsers with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `update-perl-sax-parsers --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install libxml-sax-perl. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `update-perl-sax-parsers [options] --add parser_module`. Further invocations from upstream: `update-perl-sax-parsers [options] --remove parser_module`; `update-perl-sax-parsers [options] --update`. Perl module for using and building Perl SAX2 XML processors.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Perl module for using and building Perl SAX2 XML processors.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: update-perl-sax-parsers - (de)register Perl SAX parser modules.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install libxml-sax-perl
Install with: sudo apt install libxml-sax-perl
